name: justintime
description: AI-guided, step-by-step code walkthroughs. Claude decomposes a problem into gated steps, navigates you to each change, explains it, and waits for your approval.

enumDescriptions: Claude via the Claude Agent SDK (default, first-class).
justintime.provider.description: Model provider backend. Use 'JustInTime: Set Provider & API Key' to configure. Claude is first-class; OpenAI/Ollama/custom use an OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

justintime.model.description: Model to use. For Claude, blank = your default. For OpenAI/Ollama/custom, set the model name (e.g. gpt-4o, llama3.1).

justintime.baseUrl.description: OpenAI-compatible base URL (including /v1). Used by the 'custom' provider; overrides the default for 'ollama'.

justintime.claudeExecutable.description: Path to the `claude` CLI. Blank = auto-detect on PATH. JustInTime uses your installed Claude Code CLI instead of bundling it.

justintime.autoNavigate.description: Automatically open and scroll to the target file on each step.

justintime.showPrerequisites.description: Show the prerequisites section in the explanation panel.

justintime.highlightColor.description: Background color for the target code range highlight. A translucent value (rgba) is gentler on the eyes — e.g. calm blue rgba(88,166,255,0.15) or dandelion rgba(255,214,51,0.16).

justintime.secondaryHighlightColor.description: Background color for related code highlights (kept lighter than the primary).

justintime.maxSteps.description: Maximum number of steps per walkthrough.

justintime.contextLines.description: Lines of surrounding context used to anchor a diff hunk.

justintime.analysisTimeoutSeconds.description: Abort analysis/step prep after this many seconds (0 = never; use the Cancel button instead). Raise it for very large codebases.

scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run baseline && npm run build
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && npm run build:e2e && node dist-e2e/runTest.js
